member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Native.Kernel32NativeMethods
member.summary: Provides native kernel32.dll methods for Windows thread operations.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Native.Kernel32NativeMethods.GetCurrentThread
member.summary: Gets a pseudo handle for the current thread.
member.returns: A pseudo handle for the current thread.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Native.Kernel32NativeMethods.SetThreadAffinityMask(System.IntPtr,System.UIntPtr)
member.summary: Sets a processor affinity mask for the specified thread.
member.returns: The previous affinity mask, or zero if the call failed.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Native.WinMmNativeMethods
member.summary: Provides native winmm.dll methods for timer resolution control.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Native.WinMmNativeMethods.timeBeginPeriod(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Requests a minimum timer resolution.
member.param: The requested timer resolution in milliseconds.
member.returns: Zero if successful; otherwise an error code.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Native.WinMmNativeMethods.timeEndPeriod(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Clears a previously requested timer resolution.
member.returns: Zero if successful; otherwise an error code.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Registration.DreamineThreadingWindowsRegistration
member.summary: Provides registration APIs for Windows-specific Dreamine threading services.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Registration.DreamineThreadingWindowsRegistration.Register
member.summary: Registers Windows-specific Dreamine threading services.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Services.WindowsCpuInfoProvider
member.summary: Provides CPU information for Windows threading services.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Services.WindowsProcessCpuUsageProvider
member.summary: Provides process CPU usage information on Windows.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Services.WindowsProcessCpuUsageProvider.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Services.WindowsProcessCpuUsageProvider.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the underlying handle.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Services.WindowsThreadAffinityService
member.summary: Applies CPU affinity to the current Windows thread.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Services.WindowsThreadAffinityService.ApplyToCurrentThread(System.Int32)
member.summary: Applies CPU affinity to the current thread.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Services.WindowsThreadAffinityService.ClearCurrentThreadAffinity
member.summary: Clears CPU affinity from the current thread when supported.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Services.WindowsTimerResolutionService
member.summary: Controls Windows timer resolution for high precision thread cycles.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Services.WindowsTimerResolutionService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Services.WindowsTimerResolutionService.#ctor(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The timer resolution period in milliseconds.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Services.WindowsTimerResolutionService.Begin
member.summary: Begins high precision timer resolution.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Services.WindowsTimerResolutionService.End
member.summary: Ends high precision timer resolution.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Windows.Services.WindowsTimerResolutionService.Dispose
member.summary: Releases timer resolution requests.
